{"content":[{"type":"text","text":"{\"persona\":\"prover\",\"verdict\":\"conditional\",\"summary\":\"Rounding direction flips at the zero boundary.\",\"findings\":[{\"severity\":\"warning\",\"file\":\"src/ledger.rs\",\"line\":204,\"title\":\"Truncation used where banker's rounding is documented\",\"detail\":\"amount_cents() casts through i64, truncating toward zero, so negative balances round in the account holder's favor while positive ones round against them.\",\"fix\":\"Use round_ties_even before the cast.\"}]}"}],"stop_reason":"end_turn"}
